title: Omnitrix Origins
description: Adds the "Omnitrix User" origin to minecraft along with multiple aliens from the show Ben 10
body:
A datapack for the Origins mod that adds the "Omnitrix User" origin. Said origin allows you to freely shift between multiple aliens from the TV show Ben 10.
### Current aliens as of version 0.1.0 include:
- Heatblast
- Four Arms
- Grey Matter
- Xlr8
Based on the mod by Naox95 with modifications to add the titular omnitrix and converting it into a datapack format.
